(module fizzbuzz
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set n int (string_to_int (array_get args 0)))
    (for i 1 (add n 1)
      (cond
        ((eq (mod i 15) 0) (println "FizzBuzz"))
        ((eq (mod i 3) 0) (println "Fizz"))
        ((eq (mod i 5) 0) (println "Buzz"))
        (true (println (string_from_int i)))))
    (ret 0)))

(module reverse_words
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1))
    (set sentence string (array_get args 0))
    (set words array (string_split sentence " "))
    (set reversed array (array_reverse words))
    (set result string (string_join reversed " "))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

import sys

sentence = sys.argv[1]
words = sentence.split()
print(' '.join(reversed(words)))

const sentence = process.argv[2];
console.log(sentence.split(' ').reverse().join(' '));

(module two-sum
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set argc int (argv_count))
    
    (if (lt argc 2)
      (ret 1))
    
    (set target int (string_to_int (array_get args 0)))
    (set nums_str string (array_get args 1))
    (set num_strs array (string_split nums_str " "))
    
    (set nums array (array_new))
    (set len int (array_length num_strs))
    (for idx 0 len
      (set num int (string_to_int (array_get num_strs idx)))
      (set nums (array_push nums num)))
    
    (set arr_len int (array_length nums))
    (set found bool false)
    (set result_i int -1)
    (set result_j int -1)
    
    (set i int 0)
    (while (and (lt i arr_len) (not found))
      (set j int (add i 1))
      (while (and (lt j arr_len) (not found))
        (set sum int (add (array_get nums i) (array_get nums j)))
        (if (eq sum target)
          (set found true)
          (set result_i i)
          (set result_j j))
        (set j (add j 1)))
      (set i (add i 1)))
    
    (if found
      (println (string_format "{} {}" result_i result_j))
      (else
        (println -1)))
    
    (ret 0)))

(module word_frequency

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  
  (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
    (ret 1))
  
  (set text string (array_get args 0))
  (set text_lower string (string_to_lower text))
  
  (set words array (string_split text_lower " "))
  
  (set freq map (map_new))
  
  (for-each word string words
    (if (gt (string_length word) 0)
      (cond
        ((map_has freq word)
          (set count int (map_get freq word))
          (set freq (map_set freq word (add count 1))))
        (true
          (set freq (map_set freq word 1))))))
  
  (set sorted_words array (map_keys freq))
  (set sorted_words (array_sort sorted_words))
  
  (for-each word string sorted_words
    (set count int (map_get freq word))
    (println (string_format "{} {}" word (string_from_int count))))
  
  (ret 0))
)

(module run_length_encoding
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1))
    (set input string (array_get args 0))
    (set result string "")
    (set i int 0)
    (set len int (string_length input))
    (while (lt i len)
      (set current_char string (string_slice input i 1))
      (set count int 1)
      (set j int (add i 1))
      (while (and (lt j len) (string_equals (string_slice input j 1) current_char))
        (set count (add count 1))
        (set j (add j 1)))
      (set result (string_concat result (string_concat current_char (string_from_int count))))
      (set i j))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

(module query_parser

  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (set arg_count int (argv_count))
    
    (if (eq arg_count 0)
      (ret 0))
    
    (set query string (array_get args 0))
    
    (if (eq (string_length query) 0)
      (ret 0))
    
    (set pairs array (string_split query "&"))
    (set kv_pairs array (array_new))
    (set pair_count int (array_length pairs))
    (set pair string "")
    (set eq_pos int 0)
    (set key string "")
    (set value string "")
    (set kv array (array_new))
    
    (for i 0 pair_count
      (set pair (array_get pairs i))
      (set eq_pos (string_find pair "="))
      (if (ne eq_pos -1)
        (set key (string_slice pair 0 eq_pos))
        (set value (string_slice pair (add eq_pos 1) (sub (string_length pair) (add eq_pos 1))))
        (set kv [key value])
        (set kv_pairs (array_push kv_pairs kv))))
    
    (set sorted_pairs array (sort_pairs kv_pairs))
    
    (set sorted_count int (array_length sorted_pairs))
    (set k string "")
    (set v string "")
    
    (for i 0 sorted_count
      (set kv (array_get sorted_pairs i))
      (set k (array_get kv 0))
      (set v (array_get kv 1))
      (println (string_format "{}={}" k v)))
    
    (ret 0))
  
  (fn sort_pairs pairs array -> array
    (set n int (array_length pairs))
    (set i int 0)
    (set j int 0)
    (set kv1 array (array_new))
    (set kv2 array (array_new))
    (set k1 string "")
    (set k2 string "")
    (set temp array (array_new))
    
    (while (lt i n)
      (set j 0)
      (while (lt j (sub n (add i 1)))
        (set kv1 (array_get pairs j))
        (set kv2 (array_get pairs (add j 1)))
        (set k1 (array_get kv1 0))
        (set k2 (array_get kv2 0))
        (if (gt k1 k2)
          (set temp (array_get pairs j))
          (set pairs (array_set pairs j (array_get pairs (add j 1))))
          (set pairs (array_set pairs (add j 1) temp)))
        (set j (add j 1)))
      (set i (add i 1)))
    (ret pairs)))

(module rpn_calculator
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    (if (eq (array_length args) 0)
      (ret 1))
    
    (set expr string (array_get args 0))
    (set tokens array (string_split expr " "))
    (set stack array (array_new))
    
    (for-each token string tokens
      (cond
        ((string_equals token "+")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (add a b)))
        ((string_equals token "-")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (sub a b)))
        ((string_equals token "*")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (mul a b)))
        ((string_equals token "/")
          (set b int (array_pop stack))
          (set a int (array_pop stack))
          (array_push stack (div a b)))
        (true
          (set num int (string_to_int token))
          (array_push stack num))))
    
    (set result int (array_pop stack))
    (println result)
    (ret 0)))

(module http_response
  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    
    (if (ne (array_length args) 3)
      (println "Usage: <status_code> <content_type> <body>")
      (ret 1))
    
    (set status_code string (array_get args 0))
    (set content_type string (array_get args 1))
    (set body string (array_get args 2))
    
    (set body_length int (string_length body))
    (set length_str string (string_from_int body_length))
    
    (set response string (string_format "HTTP/1.1 {} OK\r\nContent-Type: {}\r\nContent-Length: {}\r\n\r\n{}" status_code content_type length_str body))
    
    (print response)
    (ret 0)))

(module http_response
  (fn get_reason_phrase code_str string -> string
    (cond
      ((string_equals code_str "200") "OK")
      ((string_equals code_str "201") "Created")
      ((string_equals code_str "204") "No Content")
      ((string_equals code_str "301") "Moved Permanently")
      ((string_equals code_str "302") "Found")
      ((string_equals code_str "304") "Not Modified")
      ((string_equals code_str "400") "Bad Request")
      ((string_equals code_str "401") "Unauthorized")
      ((string_equals code_str "403") "Forbidden")
      ((string_equals code_str "404") "Not Found")
      ((string_equals code_str "500") "Internal Server Error")
      ((string_equals code_str "502") "Bad Gateway")
      ((string_equals code_str "503") "Service Unavailable")
      (true "Unknown")))

  (fn main -> int
    (set args array (argv))
    
    (if (ne (array_length args) 3)
      (println "Usage: <status_code> <content_type> <body>")
      (ret 1))
    
    (set status_code string (array_get args 0))
    (set content_type string (array_get args 1))
    (set body string (array_get args 2))
    
    (set body_length int (string_length body))
    (set length_str string (string_from_int body_length))
    
    (set reason_phrase string (get_reason_phrase status_code))
    
    (set cr string (char_from_code 13))
    (set lf string (char_from_code 10))
    (set crlf string (string_concat cr lf))
    
    (set line1 string (string_concat (string_concat (string_concat "HTTP/1.1 " status_code) " ") reason_phrase))
    (set line2 string (string_concat "Content-Type: " content_type))
    (set line3 string (string_concat "Content-Length: " length_str))
    
    (set response string 
      (string_concat line1
        (string_concat crlf
          (string_concat line2
            (string_concat crlf
              (string_concat line3
                (string_concat crlf
                  (string_concat crlf
                    (string_concat body lf)))))))))
    
    (print response)
    (ret 0)))

import sys

status_code = int(sys.argv[1])
content_type = sys.argv[2]
body = sys.argv[3]

status_reasons = {
    200: "OK",
    201: "Created",
    204: "No Content",
    301: "Moved Permanently",
    302: "Found",
    304: "Not Modified",
    400: "Bad Request",
    401: "Unauthorized",
    403: "Forbidden",
    404: "Not Found",
    500: "Internal Server Error",
    501: "Not Implemented",
    502: "Bad Gateway",
    503: "Service Unavailable",
}

reason_phrase = status_reasons.get(status_code, "Unknown")
content_length = len(body.encode('utf-8'))

response = f"HTTP/1.1 {status_code} {reason_phrase}\r\n"
response += f"Content-Type: {content_type}\r\n"
response += f"Content-Length: {content_length}\r\n"
response += "\r\n"
response += body

print(response, end='')

import sys

status_code = int(sys.argv[1])
content_type = sys.argv[2]
body = sys.argv[3]

status_reasons = {
    200: "OK",
    201: "Created",
    204: "No Content",
    301: "Moved Permanently",
    302: "Found",
    304: "Not Modified",
    400: "Bad Request",
    401: "Unauthorized",
    403: "Forbidden",
    404: "Not Found",
    500: "Internal Server Error",
    501: "Not Implemented",
    502: "Bad Gateway",
    503: "Service Unavailable",
}

reason_phrase = status_reasons.get(status_code, "Unknown")
content_length = len(body.encode('utf-8'))

response = f"HTTP/1.1 {status_code} {reason_phrase}\r\n"
response += f"Content-Type: {content_type}\r\n"
response += f"Content-Length: {content_length}\r\n"
response += "\r\n"
response += body
response += "\n"

sys.stdout.buffer.write(response.encode('utf-8'))

import sys

status_code = int(sys.argv[1])
content_type = sys.argv[2]
body = sys.argv[3]

status_reasons = {
    200: "OK",
    201: "Created",
    204: "No Content",
    301: "Moved Permanently",
    302: "Found",
    304: "Not Modified",
    400: "Bad Request",
    401: "Unauthorized",
    403: "Forbidden",
    404: "Not Found",
    500: "Internal Server Error",
    501: "Not Implemented",
    502: "Bad Gateway",
    503: "Service Unavailable",
}

reason_phrase = status_reasons.get(status_code, "Unknown")
content_length = len(body.encode('utf-8'))

response = b"HTTP/1.1 " + str(status_code).encode() + b" " + reason_phrase.encode() + b"\r\n"
response += b"Content-Type: " + content_type.encode() + b"\r\n"
response += b"Content-Length: " + str(content_length).encode() + b"\r\n"
response += b"\r\n"
response += body.encode() + b"\n"

sys.stdout.buffer.write(response)

import sys
import os

status_code = int(sys.argv[1])
content_type = sys.argv[2]
body = sys.argv[3]

status_reasons = {
    200: "OK",
    201: "Created",
    204: "No Content",
    301: "Moved Permanently",
    302: "Found",
    304: "Not Modified",
    400: "Bad Request",
    401: "Unauthorized",
    403: "Forbidden",
    404: "Not Found",
    500: "Internal Server Error",
    501: "Not Implemented",
    502: "Bad Gateway",
    503: "Service Unavailable",
}

reason_phrase = status_reasons.get(status_code, "Unknown")
content_length = len(body.encode('utf-8'))

response = f"HTTP/1.1 {status_code} {reason_phrase}\r\nContent-Type: {content_type}\r\nContent-Length: {content_length}\r\n\r\n{body}\n"
os.write(1, response.encode('utf-8'))

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"strconv"
)

func main() {
	statusCode := os.Args[1]
	contentType := os.Args[2]
	body := os.Args[3]

	statusCodeInt, _ := strconv.Atoi(statusCode)
	reasonPhrase := getReasonPhrase(statusCodeInt)

	contentLength := len(body)

	response := fmt.Sprintf("HTTP/1.1 %s %s\r\n", statusCode, reasonPhrase)
	response += fmt.Sprintf("Content-Type: %s\r\n", contentType)
	response += fmt.Sprintf("Content-Length: %d\r\n", contentLength)
	response += "\r\n"
	response += body

	fmt.Print(response)
}

func getReasonPhrase(code int) string {
	phrases := map[int]string{
		200: "OK",
		201: "Created",
		204: "No Content",
		301: "Moved Permanently",
		302: "Found",
		304: "Not Modified",
		400: "Bad Request",
		401: "Unauthorized",
		403: "Forbidden",
		404: "Not Found",
		500: "Internal Server Error",
		501: "Not Implemented",
		502: "Bad Gateway",
		503: "Service Unavailable",
	}
	if phrase, ok := phrases[code]; ok {
		return phrase
	}
	return "Unknown"
}

}

(module caesar

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (set argc int (argv_count))
  
  (if (ne argc 3)
    (println "Usage: caesar <encode|decode> <shift> <message>")
    (ret 1))
  
  (set mode string (array_get args 0))
  (set shift_str string (array_get args 1))
  (set message string (array_get args 2))
  
  (set shift int (string_to_int shift_str))
  
  (if (string_equals mode "decode")
    (set shift (neg shift)))
  
  (set result string (process_message message shift))
  (println result)
  (ret 0))

(fn process_message msg:string shift:int -> string
  (set result string "")
  (set len int (string_length msg))
  (set i int 0)
  (while (lt i len)
    (set char_code int (string_get msg i))
    
    (cond
      ((and (ge char_code 65) (le char_code 90))
        (set pos int (sub char_code 65))
        (set pos (add pos shift))
        (set pos (mod pos 26))
        (set pos (add pos 26))
        (set pos (mod pos 26))
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (add pos 65)))))
      
      ((and (ge char_code 97) (le char_code 122))
        (set pos int (sub char_code 97))
        (set pos (add pos shift))
        (set pos (mod pos 26))
        (set pos (add pos 26))
        (set pos (mod pos 26))
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (add pos 97)))))
      
      (true
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code char_code)))))
    
    (set i (add i 1)))
  
  (ret result))
)

(module caesar

(fn main -> int
  (set args array (argv))
  (set argc int (argv_count))
  
  (if (ne argc 3)
    (println "Usage: caesar <encode|decode> <shift> <message>")
    (ret 1))
  
  (set mode string (array_get args 0))
  (set shift_str string (array_get args 1))
  (set message string (array_get args 2))
  
  (set shift int (string_to_int shift_str))
  
  (if (string_equals mode "decode")
    (set shift (neg shift)))
  
  (set result string (process_message message shift))
  (println result)
  (ret 0))

(fn process_message msg string shift int -> string
  (set result string "")
  (set len int (string_length msg))
  (set i int 0)
  (while (lt i len)
    (set char_code int (string_get msg i))
    
    (cond
      ((and (ge char_code 65) (le char_code 90))
        (set pos int (sub char_code 65))
        (set pos (add pos shift))
        (set pos (mod pos 26))
        (set pos (add pos 26))
        (set pos (mod pos 26))
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (add pos 65)))))
      
      ((and (ge char_code 97) (le char_code 122))
        (set pos int (sub char_code 97))
        (set pos (add pos shift))
        (set pos (mod pos 26))
        (set pos (add pos 26))
        (set pos (mod pos 26))
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (add pos 97)))))
      
      (true
        (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code char_code)))))
    
    (set i (add i 1)))
  
  (ret result))
)
